title: A to Z My 1st Bath Boats, Educational Bath Toys for Babies 0+ Months, 10 Piece Stacking Set, Learn to Count
features: EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Designed to help babies learn counting through play, featuring 10 colourful boat toys perfect for bath time entertainment
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specifically designed for babies aged 0+ months, making it an ideal first bath toy for early development
STACKING FEATURE: Includes 10 pieces that can be stacked together, helping develop hand-eye coordination and motor skills
VIBRANT DESIGN: Boats come in bright, engaging colours including blue, yellow, red, orange, and green to stimulate visual development
BATH TIME FUN: Durable plastic boats float on water, making bath time both entertaining and educational for little ones
description: Product Description Make bath time both fun and educational with A to Z's My 1st Bath Boats! This delightful 10-piece set features colourful floating boats that help little ones learn counting while splashing about. Perfect for babies from birth onwards, these boats come in vibrant shades including turquoise, yellow, red, orange, and lime green. The clever stacking design allows the boats to nest together for compact storage and provides an additional learning opportunity as children sort and stack them. Each boat is numbered, making it easy for toddlers to practice their counting skills during bath time play. The boats are sized just right for little hands to grasp and manipulate in the water. This versatile bath toy set combines sensory play with early mathematics concepts, making learning a natural part of the daily bathing routine. The durable construction ensures these boats will withstand countless bath time adventures while helping develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Safety Warning Warning ! Use under adult supervision. Never leave a child unattended in a bath. When a child is stepping in or out of the bath they should be supervised by an adult
